WrongQuestion.title: Wrong Question
WrongQuestion.description: A record of a wrong question and its generated variations.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this record.

originalText.description: The OCR-recognized text of the original question.

correctAnswer.description: The correct answer to the original question (optional).

knowledgePoint.description: The core knowledge point extracted from the question.

variations.description: Three generated variations of the question.

/wrongQuestions/{questionId}.description: Collection of wrong questions and their variations.
